feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI
entry.content:
Need Suggestions for FB60 Mass Upload (Non-PO) – BDC vs BAPI

 

Hi Developers,

 

I have a requirement to develop an FB60 mass Non-PO invoice uploader, where invoices are grouped based on the Reference Number.

 

I have already developed a BDC solution, and the posting process is working correctly. However, I'm facing an issue while capturing messages from the BDC execution.

 

The problem is that even when the transaction encounters an error or warning, the returned message type is sometimes 'S' (Success). Currently, I am filtering based on Message Type and Message ID to identify successfully posted documents, but this approach is not reliable in all scenarios.

 

The business users also want to see detailed error information for records that failed during upload. However, many SAP standard error messages are not user-friendly, making it difficult for end users to understand what went wrong and which field caused the issue also it has a more than 1 line error .

 

A few additional points:

 

- This is a relatively old SAP ECC 6.0 system.

- Before suggesting a BAPI solution, please note that I have already explored BAPI options.

- In my system, automatic tax code calculation is not available.

- The BAPI approach worked only for invoices without tax codes.

- I would also like to avoid manually generating the second line item that FB60 normally creates during manual entry or BDC processing.

 

My questions are:

 

1. How do you reliably identify successful and failed postings in FB60 BDC processing?

2. Is there a better way to capture and present meaningful error messages to users?

3. Has anyone successfully implemented this using a BAPI in an older ECC system, including tax handling?

4. If you have sample code or a working approach (BDC or BAPI), it would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thanks in advance for your suggestions.

entry.title: Enhancement in VF11
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My requirement is to enhance transaction VF11 during the Save action. I am using user exits SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 for this enhancement. However, I am getting a short dump during include activation. Could you please help me identify the issue and suggest the correct approach.

Additionally, if SDVFX001 and SDVFX008 are not suitable for VF11 save processing, please advise on the appropriate enhancement spot or user exit. 

I am changed SUBC to 'F' from 'I' in table PROGDIR. But still I am facing this issues.

Advance Thanks.

entry.title: Sales order plant change when order created via IDOC
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023, I have a scenario where sales orders are created via IDOCs sent from an external system. In WEDI partner profile, the process code of the message type indicates IDOC_INPUT_ORDERS as the identification of process.

My requirement is to modify the line-item plant before save under certain circumstances. So, I created a logic in USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE but when the order is saved the default plant is not changes although the execution passes from the plant re-determination code.

If I create the order via VA01 then the plant is re-determined as expected and the execution flow is the same with IDOC. 

So, it seems that another standard EDI processing step runs after the exit and overwrites the plant.

How can I verify this?

Regards,

Konstantinos

entry.title: BAdI for Filter in Retail Fiori app Order Products
entry.content:
The Retail Fiori App Order Products (F0752) can be extended with custom filters using BAdI's BADI_RTST_OP_FILTER and BADI_RTST_OP_FILTERVALUE. This works fine; filters and their values appear in the app. When selecting a filter value however, the app breaks with message "Property x not found in type StoreProduct" because the filter field is not available in the metadata of the service. The app is based on SEGW service RETAILSTORE_ORDER_PRODUCT.  

The documentation off these BAdI's gives the following information:
For each new filter, a new corresponding property has to be created in the entity StoreProduct of the OData Service RETAILSTORE_ORDER_PRODUCT_SRV. The name of the property has to correspond to the ID of the filter so that the UI can map the filter value to the respective property. A new field also has to be created in the structure RTST_OP_S_STORE_PRODUCT_INCL that must be mapped to the new property in the entity.

There seems to be no BAdI in the SEGW service itself to add the property so how can the property be added in a clean way? Creating a custom service to redefine the standard service appears to be the only way to manage custom filters. Or am I overlooking an option?

entry.title: Send mail with multiple attachment after po is getting released in fexible workflow
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement where we need to trigger mail with excel and pdf attachment after all the approvers approve po in flexible workflow from my inbox

 

I'm not sure how to move forward with this. Please help

entry.title: Released API DDLS Was Deleted ATC Error in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Despite Object No Longer
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I am facing compatibility ATC errors during ATC checks.

The following ATC errors are raised:

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_TEST was deleted

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_OPENORDERITEM was deleted

  • Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_DELIVERY was deleted

Error example:

Changes in ZSD (DEVC), compared to version 100 (CG4), found by component BC-SRV-APS-EXT-REL:
Released API DDLS ZDD_SD_TEST was deleted.

Background:

  • These CDS views were previously released as APIs (C1 contract).

  • The CDS views no longer exist in the system.

  • When searching in ADT (Ctrl+Shift+A), the objects cannot be found.

  • In the "Manage API Snapshots" application, I cannot find these CDS views in the current SAP Default snapshot.

  • However, the compatibility ATC check still reports them as deleted APIs.

I found SAP KBA 3442779 which explains that released APIs may remain in historical API snapshots and can continue to trigger compatibility checks even after deletion.

My questions are:

  1. How can I identify the exact snapshot that still contains these deleted CDS views?

  2. If the objects no longer exist and were never delivered to customers, what is the recommended way to remove these compatibility findings?

  3. Is setting the default snapshot to "Not Check Relevant" the only solution, or is there another recommended approach?

  4. Has anyone experienced a similar issue with deleted released CDS views in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: BR_DEVELOPER role not assigned in BTP ABAP Trial
entry.content:
I executed the BTP Booster "Prepare an Account for ABAP Trial"
but my user does not have the BR_DEVELOPER business role
assigned inside the ABAP system.

Details:
- Global Account: 89a6666ftrial
- Subaccount: trial
- System ID: TRL
- System URL: https://bb8534dd-13b7-4042-bba9-41728e5288ac.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com
- User ID inside ABAP: 1780943528318-442232
- Email: my e-mail 
- Error: "You are not authorized to make changes (authorization object S_ABPLNGVS)"

Steps taken:
1. Executed Booster "Prepare an Account for ABAP Trial"
2. Tried to create Data Definition in Eclipse ADT
3. Error S_ABPLNGVS persists

Request: Please assign BR_DEVELOPER business role to my user.

entry.title: RAP FIori Element: Single field in FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE not stretching to full width
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Fiori Elements object page with multiple facets. One of the facets ("Reason") contains only a single multiline text field using #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE.

The problem is the section renders in a narrow column (~1/5 of the page width) instead of stretching full width.

> I am using OData V4.

Current annotation:

{ position: 2,
id: 'Reason',
purpose: #STANDARD,
targetQualifier: 'ReasonQualifier',
type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
label: 'Reason' }

...

@ui.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 10 } ]
@UI.multiLineText: true
ReasonText;

 What I tried:

1) cssDefault.width` on fieldGroup -- no effect

@ui.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 100, cssDefault.width: '100%' } ]
or
@UI.fieldGroup: [ { qualifier: 'ReasonQualifier', position: 100, cssDefault.width: '10rem' } ]

2) #COLLECTION with parentId -- no effect

  { position: 2,                       
    id: 'ReasonCollection',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    type: #COLLECTION,
    label: 'Reason' },

  { position: 21,                      
    id: 'ReasonQualifier',
    purpose: #STANDARD,
    parentId: 'ReasonCollection', 
    targetQualifier: 'ReasonQualifier',
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: '' },

Question:
How can I make a single multiline text fieldgroup field stretch to full width using only backend CDS/metadata annotations? Is there any standard SAP annotation that controls this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Create an own (Z*) Function-Module within an SAP-Owned Function-Group
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to create an own (Z*) Function-Module within an SAP-Owned Function-Group, Pros/Cons are not part of the Discussion.
The Function Group is M61Q.
I Created ZMD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN as Copy of MD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN
Within the INCLUDE LM61QUXX SAP add's automatically LM61QU20 as the ZMD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN is the 20st Function-Module within the Function-Group.

Questions:
I was not asked for the access-key, so i think this is not a Modifikation? In the coding of ZMD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN there's an "{ INSERT ...." Tag.
What is about changes by SAP within M61Q in the Future? Will ZMD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN still be there after an Update? If SAP adds a new include LM61QU20 into the Group, will ZMD_BEARBEITEN_KOMPONENTEN then be in LM61QU21?

Many thanks

entry.title: How to rotate text in smartforms to 90 degrees?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've requirement in smartforms, to print the text in 90 degrees vertically. I've tried the below method. But now working.

Smartform :

 

In SPAD T-code, I've created 2 print controls to the respective device type with below value and I've used them in smartforms also but text is printed as a normal text.

Output:

Expected:

 

how to fix this?

I don't know how much degrees to rotate. Kindly anyone suggest the solution.

 

Thanks,

Naveen.

entry.title: How to extend manage customer line items app in clean core way to add other standard logical fields
entry.content:
Hello, 

Another blocker of clean core way. 
We are trying to extend the manage customer line items app to have few more fields from other data sources . 


extending the i_arlineitem cds view with those fields  does not reflect in the data source extension of CFL to enable them In app. 

we created a custom app on top of i_arlineitem which is released C0 contract . Now the issue we are facing is in ATC check level 2 warning of “Usage of internal API” is coming and blocking this custom app way also . 

Can anyone please help in adding other data source field in this manage customer line app or help in fixing that atc check .

entry.title: Help with package creation
entry.content:
Hi Community. I am newly learning sap abap programing and was trying to create a package but when I click on next option it wont allow me progress further with the package creation also shows no error. Currently using the BTP trial version on eclipse

When I click on next it wont allow me to proceed ahead.
Could please help, I am newly learning the tool.

entry.title: Recommended naming convention for custom objects in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am working with ABAP Cloud in the context of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and I would like to understand the recommended naming convention for custom development objects.

In classic ABAP development, custom objects are usually created using the Z* or Y* namespace, or a registered customer namespace. However, in ABAP Cloud, I would like to know what the recommended approach is for naming custom artifacts such as:

- Packages
- Classes and interfaces
- CDS views / CDS view entities
- Behavior definitions and behavior implementations
- Service definitions and service bindings
- Metadata extensions

Is there an SAP-recommended naming convention or best practice for these objects in ABAP Cloud?

For example, should we continue using Z*/Y*, use a specific prefix per application/domain, or follow a different convention aligned with Clean Core and ABAP Cloud development guidelines?

Any official SAP documentation, examples, or practical recommendations would be very helpful.

Thank you.

entry.title: Assistance Required: OData API Errors on SAP CAL FPS01 2025
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, I am currently testing API integrations on an SAP CAL FPS01 2025 system and have encountered blockers with three standard OData services. I have done some initial troubleshooting but need guidance on standard resolutions or missing configurations.

Financial Planning API

When attempting a POST request to API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV, I receive a message stating the CREATE_ENTITY method is not implemented in the data provider class. I suspect this requires ABAP intervention in the DPC_EXT class under CO-FIO-OM-PL. Is there a standard SAP Note to regenerate the runtime objects for this service, or is manual ABAP implementation strictly required to enable POST operations?

Fixed Asset API

I cannot locate the Fixed Asset APIs in the OData V2 catalog, though I see API_FIXEDASSETACQUISITION_G4BA exists in OData V4. Have all Fixed Asset APIs strictly migrated to V4 in the 2025 release? If not, is there a recommended V2 alternative that does not require building Custom CDS Views as an External API?

Enterprise Project API

Posting to version 2 of API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRV results in an ABAP short dump OBJECTS_OBJREF_NOT_ASSIGNED_NO due to a dereferenced null object. I believe this is caused by stricter mandatory field requirements in version 2 compared to version 1. Could someone provide the absolute minimal working JSON/XML payload required for v2, or point me to a patch note for this specific dump?

API Status Matrix

 
Service Name Error Encountered Suspected Resolution Path
API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRVCREATE_ENTITY not implementedSEGW regeneration or ABAP developer overriding DPC_EXT
Fixed Asset APINot found in OData V2 catalogSwitch client integration to OData V4 endpoints
API_ENTERPRISE_PROJECT_SRVOBJECTS_OBJREF_NOT_ASSIGNED_NOCorrecting missing payload fields or applying SAP Note

entry.title: How to get before image of attachments in FWO?
entry.content:
Hi,

While working on a requirement we encountered a strange situation.

We are trying to read the before image attachment data in FWO. When a new attachment is created, before image works fine and it is possible to see the already existing attachments, also their file_content data. But when an existing attachment is removed, we cannot see the content file in before image.

We are coding inside the determination class (before save) for TRQ objects. Any idea why?

Here is the code we are using.

"Read attachment keys of this Forwarding Order.
io_read->retrieve_by_association(
EXPORTING
iv_node = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_node-root
it_key = it_key
iv_association = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_association-root-attachmentfolder
IMPORTING
et_target_key = DATA(lit_trq_att_root_key) ).

"Read the node key and association key to be able to read document data from dependent object.
/scmtms/cl_common_helper=>get_do_keys_4_rba(
EXPORTING
iv_host_bo_key = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_bo_key
iv_host_do_node_key = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_node-attachmentfolder
iv_do_node_key = /bobf/if_attachment_folder_c=>sc_node-root
iv_do_assoc_key = /bobf/if_attachment_folder_c=>sc_association-root-document_list
IMPORTING
ev_node_key = DATA(lfd_atf_node_key_doc)
ev_assoc_key = DATA(lfd_atf_assoc_key_doc) ).

"Read the attachment documents data of before image.
io_read->retrieve_by_association( 
EXPORTING
iv_node = lfd_atf_node_key_doc
it_key = lit_trq_att_root_key
iv_association = lfd_atf_assoc_key_doc
iv_before_image = abap_true
iv_fill_data = abap_true
IMPORTING
et_data = lit_trq_att_doc_bi ).

"Read the node key and association key to be able to read file content data from dependent object.
/scmtms/cl_common_helper=>get_do_keys_4_rba(
EXPORTING
iv_host_bo_key = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_bo_key
iv_host_do_node_key = /scmtms/if_trq_c=>sc_node-attachmentfolder
iv_do_node_key = /bobf/if_attachment_folder_c=>sc_node-document
iv_do_assoc_key = /bobf/if_attachment_folder_c=>sc_association-document-file_content
IMPORTING
ev_node_key = DATA(lfd_atf_node_key_cont)
ev_assoc_key = DATA(lfd_atf_assoc_key_cont) ).

"Read the file content data of before image.
io_read->retrieve_by_association( 
EXPORTING
iv_node = lfd_atf_node_key_cont
it_key = CORRESPONDING #( lit_trq_att_doc_bi MAPPING key = key )
iv_association = lfd_atf_assoc_key_cont
iv_before_image = abap_true
iv_fill_data = abap_true
IMPORTING
et_data = lit_content_bi ).

"Read the document data of current image.
io_read->retrieve_by_association( 
EXPORTING
iv_node = lfd_atf_node_key_doc
it_key = lit_trq_att_root_key
iv_association = lfd_atf_assoc_key_doc
iv_fill_data = abap_true
IMPORTING
et_data = lit_trq_att_document ).

"Read the file content data of current image.
io_read->retrieve_by_association( 
EXPORTING
iv_node = lfd_atf_node_key_cont
it_key = CORRESPONDING #( lit_trq_att_document MAPPING key = key )
iv_association = lfd_atf_assoc_key_cont
iv_fill_data = abap_true
IMPORTING
et_data = lit_content ).

entry.title: How to read FILE_CONTENT before image?
entry.content:
Hi, we have a determination class (before save) for the Forwarding Orders. (/SCMTMS/TRQ).

We encountered a wierd situation. When we add a new attachment in the FWO UI, it is possible to see the before image with true data in the determination class. But when removing an existing attachment, file_content of the removed attachment is not available in before image. Please share info about this problem.

Here is the code snippet:

entry.title: Encrypt Excel file with Password in SAP before sending as a mail attachment
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I have a requirement to develop a custom report that encrypts an Excel file (.xlsx) with a password before sending it from SAP as an email attachment.

I would like to know whether SAP provides any standard objects such as function modules or classes that can help achieve this.

So far, I have explored solutions involving the import of the ABAP2XLSX library from GitHub.

However, I would like to know whether there is any standard SAP functionality available for this requirement.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Why the idoc hierarchy are different in KAP & K4Q system. How to correct them?
entry.content:
Hi gurus,
im getting one syntax error inbound idoc in quality (K4Q-S4hana) system. because of the segment - E1EDP02 is used 5 times and max allowed is 4 times. But when compared to the PRD (KAP-ECC) system, i found there also they have used the same segment for 5 times - but you can see there 4 segment are nested under parent segment - E1IDPU1 & 1 segment is nested under another same  parent segment - E1IDPU1 (See KAP screenshot). We have migrated to the s4hane from ecc. for ecc - working fine, but s4hana - not working.

KAP:

 


K4Q:

 

TC- WE30:
Below WE30 screenshot, segment is also same in both KAP & K4Q system.

 

Now i want to know that how this structure / hierarchy is defined or created?
i want to find the root cause why this hierarchy is different in K4Q (s4) system? & how to fix it?

if you need any info please ask me....
This is little urgent..
Thnx in adv!

entry.title: RAP - Behavior projection - Error on activating Behavior projection
entry.content:
Hi All,  

Managed scenario - Created three levels of RAP BO.

Behavior definition is successfully activated however could not able to activate the "Behavior Projection".  Follwing is the error under ADT Problem - 

The association "_CUSTOMER" cannot be used as a transactional association since the target entity "ZSRA_R_CUSTTP" is not redirected to "ZSRA_C_CUST" in the CDS definition.

define root view entity  ZSRA_C_CUST
 provider contract transactional_query
  as projection on  ZSRA_CUSTTP
{
  key CustomerId,
      CustomerName,
      CreatedBy,
      CreatedAt,
      LastChangedBy,
      ChdLocalLastChangedAt,
      LastChangedAt,
      /* Assoziationen */
      _project : redirected to composition child ZSRA_C_PRJ
}

------------

define view entity ZSRA_C_PRJ
  as projection on ZSRA_R _PRJTP
{
  key CustomerId,
  key ProjectId,
      ProjectName,
      Project,
      ProjectType,
      Data,
      Exporter,
      CreatedBy,
      CreatedAt,
      LastChangedBy,
      PrjLocalLastChangedAt,
      LastChangedAt,
      /* Associations */
      _customer : redirected to parent /OSGMBH/ ZSRA_C_CUST,
      _sys: redirected to composition child ZSRA_C_SYS

}

 ------------
define view entity ZSRA_C_SYS as projection on ZSRA_ R_SYS
{
    key ProjectId,
key SystemId,
    key CustomerId,
    SystemName,
    Service,
    Tenant,
    CreatedBy,
    CreatedAt,
    LastChangedBy,
    SysLocalLastChangedAt,
    LastChangedAt,
    /* Associations */
    _project: redirected to parent  ZSRA_C_PRJ,
     _customer
}

Behavior Projection –

projection;
strict ( 2 );
use draft;
define behavior for ZSRA_C_CUST alias Customer
{
  use create;
  use update;
  use delete;
  use action Edit;
  use action Activate;
  use action Discard;
use action Resume;
  use action Prepare;
use association _project { create; with draft; }
}

define behavior for ZSRA_C_PRJ alias Project
{
  use update;
  use delete;
  use association _customer { with draft; }
  use association _sys { create; with draft; }
}
define behavior for ZSRA_C_SYS alias System
{
  use update;
  use delete;
  use association _project { with draft; }
  use association _customer { with draft; } <-- Error
}

Thanks & regards

Shobhan Rana

entry.title: Need to change custom fields in the sales order without calling change sales order BAPI
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

We have a requirement like this:

There are 2 custom fields in the sales order: one at the header level and one at the item level. These are status fields and get updated to a value based on the status of that sales order. Eg. If a sales order is delivered and PGI'ed but not invoiced, it will have a status of H7 - Delivered. Similarly, once the invoice is created, it will have a status of H9 - Invoiced. 

This functionality has been implemented and is working as designed.

There is an issue with Mexican sales orders. For such sales orders, there are 2 custom pricing conditions created with a custom routine. The issue is that even after the invoice has been created, when someone goes into VA02 and manually changes anything on the sales order (eg, header text), it triggers this custom routine and reprices the sales order. As there is now a difference between the price on the sales order and the price on the invoice, this is creating an issue.

When saving the invoice, in order to update the custom field in the sales order header, the change sales order BAPI is being called. However, this BAPI call is also triggering the custom routine, triggering a price change. Our teams are checking to resolve this issue, but a root cause hasn't been found yet. The solution also isn't clear as of now. 

We are looking for ways to update the custom field in the sales order (header and item level) without calling the change sales order BAPI, without doing a direct table udpate.

Can someone please suggest a way to achieve this.

Edit: We are using SAP S/4 HANA on Premise 2023
